title: Altar Smp remake
description: the best 1 to 1 Altarsmp remake with all events and weapons arc 1/5
body:
AltarSMP is a fully custom Minecraft SMP plugin featuring a complete remake of the original AltarSMP experience. This includes Arc 5 with all legendary weapons, the vampire/pale/human faction system with King roles and permanent True conversions, custom events, copper armor and tools, and much more.

**Note:** LibsDisguises are required for the plugin to work correctly.

## Weapons

| Weapon | Abilities |
|--------|-----------|
| **Bloodlust** | Grapple Hook, Blood Trail, passive bleed |
| **Frost Scythe** | Frost Scythe Throw, Command of Ice |
| **Hyperion** | Holy Lance, Scorching Blade — humans only at altar |
| **Nightpiercer** | Bat Transformation, Crimson Bite — Vampire King only at altar |
| **Pure Blade** | Shade Soul, Cyclone |
| **Shadow Blade** | Stealth Leap, Shadow Dagger Throw |
| **Bone Blade** | Skeletal Leap, Bone Cage |
| **Witherbone** | Triple Wither Leap, Wither Cleansing |
| **Cutlass** | Thousand Cuts, Parry |
| **Paladin's Battle Axe** | Earth Shatter, Stalwart Shield |
| **Earth Gauntlet** | Meteor Slam, Mudslide |
| **Vulcan's Crossbow** | Explosive Wrath, Scattershot |
| **Wand of Illusion** | Disguise, Morph Lock |
| **Windweaver** | Wind Leap, Charged Gust |
| **Crazy Slots** | Random Weapon Transform |
| **Pale Crossbow** | Pale Arrow, Pale Roots, Pale Curse — Plague Doctor only at altar 
| **Eclipse Sword** | Moonlit Stars, Moonlit Shadows |
| **Knightfall** | Grapple Hook, Hammer Throw (kill progression) |
| **Striker** | Strike Shot, TNT Arrows, Nuke Shot |
| **Nuke Launcher** | Nuclear Strike |
| **Echo** | Sonic Blast, Echo Shriek |

## Faction System

Five classes with different stats, effects, and exclusive crafts:

| Class | Health | Effects |
|-------|--------|---------|
| **Vampire King** (1) | 20 ♥ | Strength I, Speed II, Fire Res at night · sunlight burn at day · only one who can craft Nightpiercer |
| **Vampire** | 14 ♥ | Strength I, Speed II, Fire Res at night · sunlight burn at day · +damage from Hyperion |
| **Plague Doctor** (Pale King, 1) | 15 ♥ | Backstab x2 · Speed II on moss · Weakness II in rain · no nametag color · only one who can craft Pale Crossbow |
| **Pale** | 12 ♥ | Backstab x2 · Speed II on moss · Weakness II in rain · yellow nametag |
| **Human** | 10 ♥ | No effects · only humans can craft Hyperion |

**Conversion rules:**
- Killed by a vampire → Vampire (unless protected)
- Killed by a pale (after `/pale` activation) → Pale
- Killed by **Nightpiercer** → True Vampire (`perma_vampire`, locked)
- Killed by **Pale Crossbow** → True Pale (`perma_pale`, locked)
- Killed by **Hyperion** while cursed → True Human (`perma_human`, locked)
- True statuses block all conversion paths in both directions

All values (king health, vampire/pale health, night effect levels, backstab multiplier, rain weakness level, perma toggle, craft gates) are configurable in `config.yml`.

## MythicWeapons (Addon)

When the MythicWeapons plugin is installed, 6 additional mythic-tier weapons become available with their own altar crafting system, custom 3D models, and VFX abilities. Commands and GUIs integrate automatically — `/legendaries` adds a second page, `/cooldown` and `/altar` work across both plugins.

Join my Discord if you would like to see where to get it.

## Copper Armor Set

4-piece armor with unique abilities per piece:
- **Helmet** — Copper Vision: hold Shift to strike nearby players with lightning
- **Chestplate** — Thunder Thorns: every 7 hits triggers AoE lightning
- **Leggings** — Shockwave: fall damage converts to AoE around you
- **Boots** — Blazing Trail: permanent Speed III with fire particle trail

## Altar Crafting

Weapons aren't just given — they're crafted at interactive altars with floating item displays and holograms showing recipes. Players gather materials (shards, heads, cores) and interact with the altar to forge their weapon. Faction-restricted altars (Hyperion / Nightpiercer / Pale Crossbow) check the player's class before allowing the craft.

## Features

- **Simple controls** — F for ability 1, Shift+F for ability 2. Passives are automatic.
- **Fully configurable** — every cooldown, damage value, potion duration, enchantment level, faction stat, and craft gate is editable in `config.yml`
- **Eclipse Revamp** — toggle between classic and revamped Eclipse/Striker abilities via config
- **Weapon protection** — legendary weapons can't be stored in chests, burned, or placed in ender chests
- **Balanced PvP** — ability immunity system with separate victim/attacker cooldowns prevents combo stacking
- **Faction system** — Vampire King, Vampires, Plague Doctor, Pales, and Humans with class-exclusive crafts and permanent True conversions via signature weapons
- **Trust system** — prevent friendly fire on teammates
- **Built-in events** — Copper Trials (helmet fragments, boots bingo, leggings core, chestplate shards)
- **True damage** — certain abilities bypass armor for consistent, fair damage
- **MythicWeapons integration** — detects MythicWeapons plugin for shared `/legendaries` GUI, `/cooldown`, and `/altar` commands
- **Admin tools** — give weapons, spawn altars, manage cooldowns, set kills, mass whitelist, in-game config editor, set/clear faction tags including True statuses

## Commands

**Players:** `/controls`, `/cooldown`, `/trust`, `/legendaries`

**Admins:** `/altarsmp give`, weapon commands, altar spawning, `/pvp`, `/destroyaltars`, `/cooldown <player>`, `/setkills <bloodlust|knightfall> <player> <kills>`, `/coppertrial`, `/copperdiamondarmor`, `/setvampire <player>`, `/setvampireking <player>`, `/settruevampire <player>`, `/setpale <player>`, `/setpaleking <player>`, `/sethuman <player>` (or `/removecurse`), `/clearperma <player> [vampire|pale|human|all]`, `/pale` (activate global pale system)

## Requirements

- Paper 1.21.4+
- Java 21+
- LibsDisguises

### Optional

- Altar Smp ssn2 (paid addon — adds the second season of altarsmp to this fully compatible it currently has 5 legendaries waiting for the next arc to come out to update it ) join my Discord for more info


- MythicWeapons (paid addon — adds 6 mythic weapons with shared commands and GUI page 2) join my Discord for more info
